name: Viewing Sales Order Details
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once an order is created and recorded in your system, you can easily review all associated information by accessing the "},{"text":"Sales Orders","bold":true},{"text":" page. This section outlines how to view individual order details, along with what information is available when you open an order."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To view a specific order:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Go to the "},{"text":"Sales Orders","bold":true},{"text":" section in the back office."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Locate the order from the list."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click directly on the "},{"text":"Order Number","bold":true},{"text":" of the desired order."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BX2K7JO3UD31/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BX2K7JO3UD31/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":1220334,"width":2880,"height":1618,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FBX2K7JO3UD31%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":1322,"dateInserted":"2025-10-29T09:27:14+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Tip:","bold":true},{"text":" Orders are listed chronologically, with the most recent ones appearing at the top by default. This is the unique identifier assigned to the order. It helps in tracking, referencing, or filtering orders."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Date and Time:","bold":true},{"text":" "},{"text":"Sep 26, 2025 at 04:58 AM","code":true},{"text":"
